title: Basket tray with 2 handles in light willow with lemon pattern.
features: Tray made of woven willow with garnished lining
Dimensions: Approx. 52 x 38 cm, edge height 13 cm, handle height approx. 19 cm.
description: Sturdy wicker tray with handle and lining garnished. The tray is made from boiled willow and is excellently made. It is absolutely suitable for everyday use and should not be missing in any household and will certainly not disappoint. Also available in other fabrics. Please note the dimensions. Frame height 32 cm x edge height 13 cm.
